title: Changelog
subtitle: A running timeline of product improvements, structure changes, and interface upgrades.
footer: Thank you for using Chinese Cigarette Museum. We will continue to improve the product experience.

v1_2_0.featureGallery: Added gallery support to brand detail pages
v1_2_0.fixPagination: Fixed incorrect pagination in search results

v1_1_0.improveBrandList: Refactored the brand list page for faster loading

v1_0_0.featureLaunch: Initial release of the brand database
v1_0_0.improveResponsive: Added responsive support for mobile devices
